title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-376)
description: On April 22, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 18.11.1, 18.10.4 and 18.9.6
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 18.11.1, 18.10.4 and 18.9.6
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
